name: sovereign-plugins
description: Production-grade Claude Code skills for the full project lifecycle — setup, daily workflow, session management, and quality audits

plugins.name: setup
plugins.description: Combines infrastructure setup (rules, hooks, memory, routing, agent team) with interview-based project scaffolding (CLAUDE.md, ROADMAP, .gitignore, .env.example) into one guided flow

plugins.name: scope
plugins.description: Define what is IN, what is OUT, and exit criteria before implementation. Quick mode (3 questions) or Full mode (layered spec with ADR)

plugins.name: freeze
plugins.description: Declare the editable zone — everything outside is frozen. Prevents scope creep during implementation

plugins.name: goal-lock
plugins.description: Agent discipline engine — locks the goal, enforces PLAN-DO-VERIFY-FINALIZE-OUTPUT loop, detects 13 success masquerading patterns

plugins.name: pre-push
plugins.description: Mandatory pre-push pipeline — secrets scan (12 patterns), build/test gate, lint, parallel AI code review. Blocks push on Critical/High findings

plugins.name: session-start
plugins.description: Session opener — loads handoff from last session, reviews lessons learned, runs health check, outputs ready signal with priority action

plugins.name: session-checkpoint
plugins.description: Session closer — saves context before compact. Handoff file, memory updates, lesson extraction, reflexion

plugins.name: project-check
plugins.description: Scan existing project across 4 dimensions: Infrastructure, Security, Quality, Harness. Returns scored gaps ordered by severity

plugins.name: code-autopsy
plugins.description: 12Q quantified code review — 4-axis scoring (Security/Stability/Robustness/Operability), severity anchors, deployment verdict, factuality gate. Works as standalone prompt in any LLM

plugins.name: collab-audit
plugins.description: 13-section AI collaboration audit — analyzes actual work patterns to generate behavioral profile, blind spots, and growth direction

plugins.name: stepback
plugins.description: One-shot perspective reset — 1 reframing question + 3 quick checks (scope drift, side effects, better approach) in under 10 lines. Use anytime during work

plugins.name: skill-ops
plugins.description: Skill ops hub: snapshot/rollback, usage health, and invocation tracking for Claude Code skills and agents

plugins.name: next-action
plugins.description: Reads handoff/git/lessons/STATE and proposes top-3 next actions by impact. Proposes only, never executes

plugins.name: project-overview
plugins.description: Generates a deterministic cross-project status map from registered projects' session handoffs
